title: stop->Keep mapping not commented at call site
description: evaluator.rs eval_script: StmtResult::Stop falls into the _ => SieveAction::Keep arm with no comment. The RFC 5228 §4.5 rule that 'stop with no prior disposition implies implicit keep' is not obvious at the call site. A contributor seeing the wildcard arm might think Stop is a bug or might break the behavior while adding a new StmtResult variant. Add a comment on the _ arm citing RFC 5228 §4.5, or add an explicit Stop arm with the comment.
